title: Sedimentary Rocks
script_summary: Explore the fascinating formation and significance of sedimentary rocks.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you sedimentary rocks hold secrets about Earth’s past?
Sedimentary rocks form from layers of sediments, like mud and sand, compacted over time.
These layers can reveal stunning details about ancient environments and even past life forms.
Fossils, for instance, often found in sedimentary rocks, are key to understanding evolution.
So next time you see a sedimentary rock, remember, it’s a page from Earth’s history waiting to be read.
Curious about more Earth secrets? Hit that follow button!
